old_value: {"id":"ew-ruz","title":"Fix paste reliability when user switches apps during recording","description":"The 150ms hardcoded sleep after app.activate() is insufficient when the user tabs away during longer recordings. The target app may not be fully foregrounded before Cmd+V fires, causing the paste to silently fail (transcript saves to history but doesn't paste). Fix: verify frontmost app matches targetApp before pasting, with a retry/backoff loop instead of a fixed sleep.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"saurabhav@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:23:29Z","created_by":"saurabhav88","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:23:29Z"}

new_value: Replaced hardcoded 150ms sleep with polling loop that verifies target app is frontmost before pasting (50ms polls, 500ms timeout). Logs a warning if activation fails.

{"description":"Implement tiered paste system to replace single-method CGEvent Cmd+V approach. Validated by Gemini + OpenAI.

ARCHITECTURE (ordered cascade):
- Tier 1: AX direct insertion via kAXSelectedTextAttribute on captured AXFocusedUIElement (zero disruption, no clipboard, no focus change)
- Tier 2: Activate app + CGEvent Cmd+V via .cgAnnotatedSessionEventTap (current approach, refined with AXObserver-based paste confirmation)
- Tier 2b: AppleScript Edit > Paste (sandboxed app fallback, requires frontmost)  
- Tier 3: Clipboard + user notification (graceful failure, text never lost)

KEY IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS:
- Capture AXFocusedUIElement at PTT start (alongside existing NSRunningApplication)
- All AX calls on MainActor (AXUIElement is Sendable but operations are not thread-safe)
- Set AXTimeout(1.0s) before AX writes to avoid 30s hang on misbehaving apps
- Verify kAXRoleAttribute == textField/textArea before Tier 1 attempt
- Log (bundle_id, successful_tier, duration_ms) for compatibility analytics
- Switch CGEvent tap from .cghidEventTap to .cgAnnotatedSessionEventTap

FILES TO MODIFY:
1. TranscriptionPipeline.swift — add targetElement capture + tiered paste cascade
2. PasteService.swift — add insertViaAccessibility(), pasteViaAppleScript(), switch event tap, add AXObserver paste confirmation
3. Constants.swift — paste confirmation polling constants

SOURCES: Hex (kitlangton/Hex), speak2 (zachswift615/speak2), Gemini, OpenAI","status":"in_progress","title":"Implement tiered paste system (AX direct → CGEvent → AppleScript → clipboard)"}
old_value: {"id":"ew-zwn","title":"Research background paste via AX APIs","description":"Instead of activate() + Cmd+V, capture AXFocusedUIElement at recording start and write directly to the element's AXValue when pasting. This would allow paste without bringing the target app to the foreground. Needs research: test AX value writes across Safari, Slack, VS Code, Terminal, native AppKit apps. Determine feasibility and fallback strategy for apps that don't support direct AX writes.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"saurabhav@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T22:23:30Z","created_by":"saurabhav88","updated_at":"2026-03-03T22:23:30Z"}

{"id":"ew-0cy","title":"Polish: scene-by-scene visual audit (panels 3-10)","description":"Continuing scene-by-scene visual polish of The Two of Us V2 manhwa scroll story at docs/the-two-of-us-v2/. 

STATUS: Scenes 01 and 02 are DONE. Resume at Scene 03.

USER'S CORE RULES (non-negotiable):
1. NO opacity/fade animations on ANY text — text must always be 100% opaque
2. NO transitionary fading — no framer-motion opacity on text elements
3. RainbowText (background-clip:text gradient) appears BLACK on dark backgrounds — needs strong drop-shadow or scrim behind it
4. Position text in the dark/negative space WITHIN the AI art panel, not floating outside it
5. All text must pop like manhwa text — bold, crisp, fully readable

WHAT WAS DONE (sessions 1-2):
- Stripped all SVG/CSS illustrations from all 10 scenes (AI Art Hero pass)
- Removed scroll-behavior:smooth, overflow-x:hidden, overscroll-behavior:none from html/body
- Removed overflow:hidden from .scene sections
- Removed ALL framer-motion parallax (useScroll/useTransform) from Scene.tsx
- Removed ALL opacity animations from text elements across all scenes
- Added multi-layer text-shadow to all text, bumped font-weights, brightened colors
- RainbowText: triple drop-shadow filter (text-shadow doesn't work with background-clip:text)
- Scene 02: repositioned text into dark pocket (left-aligned, inside panel, margin-left: 30px, justify-content: flex-end, padding-bottom: 180px)
- Scene 03: chat bubble backgrounds boosted to 0.35/0.30 alpha
- Scene 05: dark scrim + backdrop-blur behind step labels and caption
- Scene 06: dark scrim + backdrop-blur behind caption
- Scene 08: AI image opacity reduced to 0.28, radial gradient scrim behind mainText, text colors brightened
- Scene 09: teamOld opacity 0.55, comparison box border 0.15, arrow brightened

APPROACH FOR REMAINING SCENES:
- Screenshot each scene via Playwright MCP (localhost:5174)
- Show user, get feedback, iterate positioning/readability
- Text must sit in negative space within the AI illustration
- Use dark scrims (rgba bg + backdrop-blur) where needed for readability
- No opacity animations on text ever

KEY FILES: docs/the-two-of-us-v2/src/scenes/Scene{03-10}*.tsx and *.module.css
TOOLS: Playwright MCP for screenshots (browser_navigate, browser_evaluate for scrolling, browser_take_screenshot)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"saurabhav@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-04T18:40:24Z","created_by":"saurabhav88","updated_at":"2026-03-04T18:40:24Z"}
